description: initial state — 194 tests, 188 pass, 6 fail
notes: 6 failures in installer preflight + uninstall CLI; 30 open issues; coverage: 93% lines, 98% functions, 87% branches

description: fix 3 remaining test failures: uninstall symlink rm, installer sudo heuristic
notes: uninstall.sh: check dir writability not symlink target; scripts/install.sh: check npm prefix writability instead of assuming nodesource needs sudo

description: fix #579/#664: add redactSecrets to runner.js, fix API key exposure in setupSpark/walkthrough/telegram-bridge
notes: added redactSecrets() with 4 patterns (env assignments, nvapi-, ghp_, Bearer); error messages now redacted; setupSpark passes key via env not cmdline; walkthrough.sh uses tmux -e; telegram-bridge uses SSH SendEnv; 9 new tests

description: fix #693: add local-inference policy preset for Ollama/vLLM host gateway access
notes: new local-inference.yaml preset allows host.openshell.internal on ports 11434 (Ollama) and 8000 (vLLM) with binaries restriction; onboard auto-suggests preset when local provider selected; 4 new tests

description: fix #676: add missing binaries section to all 9 policy presets
notes: all presets now have binaries section (openclaw+claude base; pypi adds pip; npm adds npm/node/yarn; docker adds docker); 3 new regression tests; validatePreset() warns on missing binaries; also fixed installer HTTPS remediation test

description: fix #692/#606/#719: safe config I/O with EACCES error handling
notes: new config-io.js module: atomic writes (tmp+rename), EACCES→ConfigPermissionError with remediation hints; credentials.js and registry.js refactored to use it; 15 new tests covering dir creation, write, read, permission errors

description: fix #583: verify integrity of downloaded scripts before execution
notes: new download_and_verify() helper: download to temp file, SHA-256 verify, then execute; applied to Ollama (install.sh), NodeSource (scripts/install.sh, scripts/brev-setup.sh); nvm refactored to use shared helper; NEMOCLAW_SKIP_INTEGRITY=1 env var for CI bypass; 7 new tests

description: fix #684: configurable ports with auto-resolution for conflict avoidance
notes: gateway (8080) and dashboard (18789) ports now configurable via NEMOCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT/NEMOCLAW_DASHBOARD_PORT env vars; resolvePort() auto-selects alternative (port+1..+9) when default is occupied; parsePortEnv() validates 1024-65535 range; error messages now suggest env var override; 15 new tests

description: fix #616: unify credential passing pattern across integrations
notes: added buildCredentialEnv() helper + KNOWN_CREDENTIAL_KEYS to credentials.js; nemoclaw.js deploy uses buildCredentialEnv() instead of manual per-key reads; onboard.js sandbox create uses buildCredentialEnv(); removed redundant getCredential()||process.env fallbacks; setupInference passes NVIDIA_API_KEY via env indirection (_NEMOCLAW_CRED) not CLI args; telegram-bridge.js uses getCredential(); 13 new tests

description: fix #626: DNS resolution blocked on non-Colima Docker runtimes
notes: shouldPatchCoredns() now returns true for colima, docker-desktop, and docker; fix-coredns.sh accepts runtime arg and handles Docker Desktop socket + plain Docker default socket; onboard passes runtime to fix-coredns.sh; 4 new tests for DNS upstream resolution on non-Colima runtimes

description: fix #731/#726: npm link --ignore-scripts for git checkout install + sudo lsof hint
notes: install.sh: npm link now uses --ignore-scripts on both source-checkout and GitHub-clone paths to avoid husky prepare hook failure (error 127); onboard.js: lsof suggestions now include sudo prefix; preflight.js: lsof falls back to sudo -n when non-root gets empty output; 1 new regression test

description: fix #737: detect and remove placeholder npm package that clobbers real installation
notes: both installers: detect_placeholder_package() checks npm root -g for placeholder (no bin.nemoclaw field) and removes it before linking; post-install verify_nemoclaw checks --version output not empty; docs fixed to use git+https URL instead of bare npm install -g nemoclaw; 3 new regression tests

description: fix #578: SHA-pin all GitHub Actions in CI workflows
notes: all 6 workflow files: every uses: action pinned to full 40-char commit SHA with version comment; actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4, actions/setup-python@v5, actions/upload-artifact@v4, astral-sh/setup-uv@v4, rossjrw/pr-preview-action@v1; 7 new regression tests validate no unpinned actions

description: fix #628: local Ollama/vLLM model reflected in sandbox openclaw.json
notes: extracted selectInferenceProvider() from setupNim(); model selection now runs BEFORE sandbox creation; patchDockerfileModel() patches ARG NEMOCLAW_MODEL in build context so openclaw.json is built with correct model; onboard flow reordered: select provider (step 3) → create sandbox (step 4); 6 new tests

description: fix #710/#709: early Ollama validation — no-models guard + Linux bind address hint
notes: hasInstalledOllamaModels() checks ollama list before sandbox creation; exits immediately if no models installed with remediation (ollama pull); getOllamaBindAddressHint() shows OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0 fix on Linux; validateLocalProvider() runs early in Step 3 on Linux to catch container-unreachable Ollama before multi-minute sandbox build; 8 new tests

description: feat #666: add --verbose/--debug flag and LOG_LEVEL env var for CLI observability
notes: new logger.js module: debug() writes timestamped messages to stderr when verbose; runner.js: run/runInteractive/runCapture log commands (redacted) and exit codes; nemoclaw.js: --verbose/--debug stripped before dispatch, LOG_LEVEL=debug and NEMOCLAW_VERBOSE=1 env vars supported; help text updated; 13 new tests

description: fix #739: configurable OpenClaw version, expanded trustedProxies, extra allowedOrigins
notes: OPENCLAW_VERSION build arg (override via NEMOCLAW_OPENCLAW_VERSION env); trustedProxies now includes RFC1918 CIDRs (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16) for SSH tunnel and reverse proxy setups; NEMOCLAW_EXTRA_ORIGINS build arg for additional CORS origins (comma-separated); patchDockerfileVersion() + patchDockerfileExtraOrigins() helpers; 9 new tests

description: fix #744: DNS resolution fails on DGX Spark — systemd-resolved stub fallback
notes: resolve_coredns_upstream() now falls back to /run/systemd/resolve/resolv.conf when host /etc/resolv.conf has only loopback (127.0.0.53 stub); new get_systemd_resolved_upstream() helper; NEMOCLAW_RESOLVED_CONF env var for testing; fix-coredns.sh error message includes systemd-resolved hint; 4 new regression tests

description: fix #684/#713: configurable NIM port via NEMOCLAW_NIM_PORT + nimStatus port fix
notes: NIM port (default 8000) now configurable via NEMOCLAW_NIM_PORT env var; nimStatus() accepts port param instead of hardcoded 8000; onboard resolves NIM port alongside gateway/dashboard; nimPort stored in registry for sandboxStatus(); preflight getConfiguredPorts() returns nimPort; 10 new tests

description: fix #622: sandbox home directory permission repair (0711 → 0755)
notes: Dockerfile: explicit chmod 755 /sandbox after user creation; nemoclaw-start.sh: fix_home_permissions() detects restrictive modes (700/710/711) and repairs to 755 at runtime; test Dockerfile.sandbox updated; 9 new tests (4 Dockerfile validation + 5 functional shell tests)

description: add blueprint Python test suite: runner, snapshot, policies
notes: 134 pytest tests across 3 files: test_runner.py (48 tests — helpers, plan, apply, status, rollback, CLI parser), test_snapshot.py (16 tests — create/restore/cutover/rollback/list), test_policies.py (70 tests — base policy validation, all 10 presets parametrized for structure/binaries/ports/SPDX); blueprint coverage from 0% to comprehensive; pytest config added to pyproject.toml

description: expand branch coverage: policies.js + inference-config.js uncovered paths
notes: 25 new tests: validatePreset warning branch, extractPresetEntries null/valid, parseCurrentPolicy all 3 branches (null/no-sep/with-sep), applyPreset sandbox name validation (6 cases) + missing preset, getAppliedPresets unknown sandbox; inference-config: vllm-local provider, unknown provider→null, getOpenClawPrimaryModel defaults for ollama/nim/unknown/explicit

description: export + test onboard.js internal helpers; multi-module branch coverage

description: multi-module branch coverage: CLI, config-io, platform, resolve-openshell, logger
notes: 26 new tests: CLI --version/-v/--verbose/--debug dispatch (6), config-io ensureConfigDir non-EACCES rethrow + writeConfigFile non-EACCES rethrow + ConfigPermissionError no-cause (3), platform findColimaDockerSocket null + isUnsupportedMacosRuntime non-podman + getDockerSocketCandidates win32/darwin (6), resolve-openshell empty/relative/absolute commandV + home edge cases (7), logger format specifier overflow + plain message (2); logger.js 100% branches; config-io 85% branches; resolve-openshell 85.71% branches; platform 84.31% branches

description: fix #733: expose full model catalog so openshell inference set can switch models; fix printDashboard nimPort regression
notes: activeModelEntries() now always returns full 6-model catalog (added kimi-k2.5, qwen3.5); onboarded model prepended if custom; printDashboard reads nimPort from registry before calling nimStatus(); 4 new tests (3 TS: catalog-when-onboarded, no-duplicate-for-catalog-model, unprefixed-without-onboard; 1 JS: printDashboard nimPort fallback)

description: fix #747/#738: broken docs links and confusing setup-spark exit messaging
notes: README.md: commands.md→commands.html; PR template: relative links fixed (../CONTRIBUTING.md); setup-spark.sh: exit message explains cgroup config and need to re-onboard; 6 new regression tests (docs URL extensions, local page existence, PR template link resolution, setup-spark messaging)

description: feat #642: add nemoclaw update command for self-update
notes: new update.js module: detectInstallType() (source/global/unknown), checkForUpdate() via git ls-remote, updateSource() (git fetch+reset+rebuild+link), updateGlobal() (npm install -g); CLI: nemoclaw update [--check]; help includes Updates section; 14 new tests

description: fix #724: add build toolchain for native Node.js addons on aarch64 (WhatsApp/libsignal-node)
notes: Dockerfile + test/Dockerfile.sandbox: install build-essential + python3-dev for native addon compilation (baileys/libsignal-node, matrix-sdk-crypto, protobufjs, koffi); purge build tools after npm installs to save ~200MB; 7 new regression tests validate toolchain presence, ordering, and cleanup

description: fix: prevent build-arg injection in Dockerfile Python config generator
notes: Dockerfile: promote ARGs to ENV, Python script reads os.environ.get() instead of shell interpolation ('${VAR}'); onboard.js: isSafeVersion()/isSafeOriginsList() validate patchDockerfileVersion/patchDockerfileExtraOrigins inputs; 15 new regression tests cover injection rejection, safe-value acceptance, os.environ usage, ENV promotion

description: nim.js detectGpu() branch coverage: all GPU detection paths tested via DI
notes: detectGpu() now accepts optional {runCapture, platform} deps for testability; 20 new tests: NVIDIA single/multi GPU VRAM (2), nvidia-smi empty/non-numeric/throws (3), GB10 Spark with free -m valid/empty/throws/NaN (4), GB10 skip non-GB10 name/name throws (2), Apple Silicon VRAM GB/MB (2), Apple sysctl fallback valid/throws/empty (3), no chipset match/empty profiler/profiler throws (3), non-darwin skip (1)

description: fix #716: add nemoclaw reconnect command for gateway/sandbox connectivity repair
notes: new reconnect.js module: checkGatewayHealth/checkSandboxHealth/restartGateway/waitForGatewayHealthy/repairCoreDns/restartPortForwards/diagnose/reconnect; CLI: nemoclaw reconnect [sandbox] [--diagnose]; repairs WSL2/Docker restart connectivity without full re-onboard; help text updated; 32 new tests

description: fix #736: model-aware reasoning and maxTokens in openclaw.json config
